import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
    when Some(n)
      mut sum = 0
      mut i = 1
      while i <= n
        sum = sum + i
        i = i + 1
      end
      print("sum=#{sum}")
    when None
      print("sum=0")
    end
  when None
    print("sum=0")
  end
end
